text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... It's harder than it looks, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I'm sure I wouldn't have done any
better.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I could tell by the look on your face that you were
trying your best.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's more than enough for me—plushie or no
plushie.
